DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PETITIONER GIZZARELLI, DAVID THE GUARDIAN OF CHARLIE
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-06-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE TRO STAYING EXECUTION OF CHARLIE IS EXTENDED THROUGH WEDNESDAY DECEMBER 12, 2012. COUNSEL FOR EACH PARTY IS ORDERED TO SUBMIT TO THE COURT A PROPOSED ORDER VIA EMAIL (COPYING OPPOSING COUNSEL ON EMAIL) NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 7, 2012. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077. SUBMITTED ON DEC-06-2012 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II.

calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Application For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John F. Mounier, Esq., 415.967.8361, for petitioner David Gizzarelli.
Margaret W. Baumgartner, Deputy City Attorney, for respondent City and County of San Francisco.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. At conclusion of argument, the Court orders that the TRO staying execution of Charlie is extended through Wednesday December 12, 2012 and takes Petitioner's Application For Writ Of Mandamus under submission. Counsel for each party is ordered to submit to the court a proposed order via email (copying opposing counsel on email) no later than December 7, 2012. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
